_README: TEMPLATE ONLY. This file is the STRUCTURE for a federal rule pack — it deliberately contains NO authoritative dollar amounts. Copy it to <year>.json, open each figure's official IRS source, enter the real value for your tax year, and set verified:true. Until a figure is verified, the assistant treats it as 'needs review' and will not compute a final number from it. New tax year? Click the updater to open the official IRS page, then fill these in.

figures.note: Standard deduction, Single — verify in the official 1040 instructions for your year.
